title: Typography
description: Typographic system with semantic variants (display, heading, title, body, caption…), sizes and weights. The as prop lets you map to the appropriate HTML tag to maintain accessible hierarchy.

props.variant: Semantic typographic style. Defines the default tag.
props.size: Scale within the variant. Inherited from ModoProvider if omitted.
props.as: Overrides the HTML tag inferred by the variant.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the text.
props.truncate: Truncates with ellipsis to a single line.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Each variant defines a visual hierarchy and a default HTML tag.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Each variant has three scales (small, medium, large).

weights.title: Weights
weights.desc: Six weights available from light to extrabold.

colors.title: Semantic colors
colors.desc: Use provider colors to maintain consistency and accessibility.

truncate.title: Truncate
truncate.desc: Truncates the text to a single line with ellipsis when it exceeds the width.

types.title: Typography
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Typography component props. Supports variant, size, as, weight, align, color, truncate, italic, underline and strikethrough.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaHidden: Decorative text can be hidden from screen readers
a11y.focusNative: Text is not interactive; does not participate in the tab order
